headline: BEN's February AUM Rises on Positive Markets: Will the Upside Last?
summary: Franklin reported sequential AUM growth to $1.74T in February, will the momentum continue with markets and strategic moves?

raw.headline: BEN's February AUM Rises on Positive Markets: Will the Upside Last?
raw.summary: Franklin reported sequential AUM growth to $1.74T in February, will the momentum continue with markets and strategic moves?

headline: Franklin Resources AUM Growth Supports Valuation And Dividend Sustainability Questions
summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) reported a material increase in assets under management for February 2026. The move was driven by positive market performance and strong long term net inflows. Management highlighted that inflows extended beyond the Western Asset Management division. The update is separate from recent quarterly earnings and focuses on ongoing operational performance. For you as an investor, this AUM update matters because Franklin Resources earns fees on the assets it manages,...
